identity.name: AuraGraph
identity.tagline: The Cognitive Operating System for Students
identity.description: AI-powered study platform that fuses textbooks and slides into a single knowledge graph.
identity.aesthetics: Intellectual Minimalism meets High-Tech AI. Think 'Notion' meets 'Obsidian' with a touch of 'Ivy League Library'.
identity.target_audience: IIT/Engineering Students (18-25). High achievers, efficient, tech-savvy.

usage.headings: Playfair Display (Serif) for emotional connection and 'textbook' feel. Weights: 600/700.
usage.ui_text: Manrope (Sans) for dashboard, buttons, and navigation. Clean, modern, legible.
usage.reading_content: Crimson Pro (Serif) for the Fused Notes. Optimized for long-form reading.
usage.code_snippets: JetBrains Mono for any math/code blocks.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black (#000000). Use #1A1A1A or #0F172A. Backgrounds should feel like 'Paper' (#FDFBF7) rather than 'Screen White' (#FFFFFF) where possible, especially in reading views.

layout_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode A). Use a grid of 12 columns. Notebooks should be cards that span 4 cols. 'Quick Actions' span 2 cols.
layout_strategy.workspace: Split Pane Layout. Left: Source (PDF/Slides). Right: Fused Note (Editable). Floating Sidebar: Knowledge Graph.
layout_strategy.containers: Rounded corners (rounded-xl or rounded-2xl). Subtle borders (border-stone-200).
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-6 to p-8) inside cards. Gap-6 between grid items.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or floating toolbars. Class: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-200/50'.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows. 'shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]'. Hover states should lift ('shadow-lg -translate-y-1').
visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle CSS noise overlay on the main background to give it a 'paper' feel. opacity-50 mix-blend-multiply.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders in #E5E5E5. For active inputs or focused cards, use a 'Trace Beam' effect or a solid brand color border.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white hover:bg-brand-primary/90 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 hover:text-stone-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.notebook: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl p-0 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-all group relative cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border-stone-200 focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary/20 rounded-lg

navigation.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-stone-200 bg-background-sidebar h-screen p-4 flex flex-col
navigation.topbar: h-16 border-b border-stone-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur sticky top-0 z-50 px-6 flex items-center justify-between

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
motion.list_stagger: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

libraries.graph: react-force-graph or react-d3-graph (Check package.json, otherwise use Shadcn/Recharts for analytics)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-600+ is used on white backgrounds. Avoid text-slate-400 for body text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-offset-2) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Playfair Display' or 'Instrument Serif'.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup global CSS variables for the 'Paper' theme (#FDFBF7 background).
2. Install 'Playfair Display' and 'Crimson Pro' via Google Fonts (or @fontsource).
3. Refactor the Dashboard to use a Masonry/Bento grid for Notebooks.
4. Implement the 'Fused Note' view as a centered, max-w-3xl article container with 'Crimson Pro' typography.
5. Ensure the Knowledge Graph sidebar floats or is collapsible.
6. Use the 'Trace Beam' effect for the 'Note Mutation' active state.
7. Strictly follow the color palette. No generic blue.
8. Use 'data-testid' on all buttons and inputs.
